tests.name: explicit-invocation
tests.prompt: Can you provide a design critique on my UI screenshot here? I'm particularly concerned about the visual hierarchy and typography in the design.

criteria: Identifies both Strengths and Areas for Improvement

tests.name: implicit-invocation
tests.prompt: I'm about to present my app design to stakeholders. Can you take a quick look and suggest improvements, particularly around usability?

tests.name: edge-case
tests.prompt: Here is a design intended for a visually impaired audience. I need feedback on the accessibility features, especially color contrast and text alternatives.

criteria: Evaluates Color Contrast and Text Alternatives
